record.summary: rauthy as the OIDC IdP, reached exclusively through the app's own origin: the idp service mounts /auth/* as a raw passthrough proxy onto rauthy (RAUTHY_UPSTREAM, default 127.0.0.1:8081), so issuer, callback, and SPA share one origin with no CORS. auth/rauthy.ts is the OIDC authorization-code + PKCE driver (login redirect + callback) plugged into spec 004's driver registry. Dev runs rauthy via docker compose with the same declarative client bootstrap the container uses in prod.
record.title: rauthy behind a same-origin proxy + OIDC driver
